name: agentic-detection-lookups
description: Machine-readable detection lookups for SIEM enrichment and AI agents. Check LOLBAS (Windows), GTFOBins (Linux), and process parent-child baselines via MCP tools.
long_description: Query 800+ LOLBAS and GTFOBins binaries plus 97 parent-child process baselines without embedding data in prompts. Look up any binary to get risk level, abuse categories, and MITRE ATT&CK mappings. Search by category, MITRE technique, or free text. Purpose-built for detection engineering, threat hunting, and SOC automation.

tools.name: detection_lookup_binary
tools.description: Check if a binary is a known LOLBAS (Windows) or GTFOBins (Linux) living-off-the-land binary. Returns risk, categories, and MITRE ATT&CK mappings.

tools.name: detection_check_parent_child
tools.description: Check if a process parent-child relationship is expected or suspicious (e.g., winword.exe spawning cmd.exe).

tools.name: detection_list_by_category
tools.description: List all binaries in a specific abuse category (e.g., Execute, shell, reverse-shell, Download). Supports pagination.

tools.name: detection_list_by_mitre
tools.description: List all binaries mapped to a specific MITRE ATT&CK technique (e.g., T1218, T1059, T1105). Supports pagination.

tools.name: detection_search
tools.description: Free-text search across all lookup files (LOLBAS, GTFOBins, parent-child baselines). Returns total count and has_more flag.

tools.name: detection_list_lookups
tools.description: List all available lookup files with row counts and column schemas.
